_about: Hand-labeled extraction gold set for Aritiq Day 2. Each document pairs a SOURCE (ground truth) with an AI-generated SUMMARY (audited). Every numeric claim in each summary is labeled with its correct operation, operand values in the correct order, and per-operand grounding (grounded/inferred/missing). 'expected_status' is the verifier verdict the GOLD operands should produce — used only as a self-consistency check, never to score extraction. 'trap' documents what each hard case stresses.

_labeling_conventions.operand_order: percent_change/absolute_change: [old, new]; difference: [a,b] for a-b; ratio: [a,b] for a/b; margin_percent: [numerator, denominator].
_labeling_conventions.sign: Decreases are negative stated_value (a 25% decline is -25).
_labeling_conventions.grounded: value appears verbatim in the source.
_labeling_conventions.inferred: value derived from the source by a transparent conversion (unit scaling or summing line items).
_labeling_conventions.missing: value is absent from the source; must not be guessed.

documents.name: Northwind Logistics — Q3 FY2025 earnings release
documents.source:
Northwind Logistics — Q3 FY2025 Results

Total revenue for the third quarter was $125.0 million, up from $100.0 million in the prior-year quarter. Gross profit was $50.0 million. Operating income was $30.0 million, compared with $25.0 million a year ago. Operating expenses were $20.0 million. The company ended the quarter with $80.0 million in cash. Domestic revenue was $75.0 million and international revenue was $50.0 million.
documents.summary: Northwind delivered another strong quarter. Total revenue reached $125.0 million, a 30% increase year over year. Gross margin came in at 40%. Operating income grew 20% year over year, an increase of $5.0 million. Gross profit was 2.5 times operating expenses. Combined domestic and international revenue was $125.0 million. The company ended with $80.0 million in cash and strengthened its competitive position in key markets.

gold_claims.claim_text: Total revenue reached $125.0 million, a 30% increase year over year
gold_claims.trap: operand_order (summary lists 125 before 100); real change is 25%, claim says 30%

gold_claims.claim_text: Gross margin came in at 40%
Operating income grew 20% year over year
an increase of $5.0 million
gold_claims.trap: two claims in one sentence (shares operands with A3 but different operation)

gold_claims.claim_text: Gross profit was 2.5 times operating expenses
Combined domestic and international revenue was $125.0 million
The company ended with $80.0 million in cash
strengthened its competitive position in key markets

documents.name: Acme Corp — Invoice #4471
documents.source:
INVOICE #4471 — Acme Corp

Line items:
  Widgets: 200 units @ $15.00 each
  Gadgets: 50 units @ $40.00 each
Subtotal: $5,000.00
Discount: $500.00
Tax (10%): $450.00
Total due: $4,950.00
documents.summary: Invoice #4471 bills Acme Corp for two product lines. Widget revenue was $3,000 (200 units at $15). The subtotal was $5,000. After a $500 discount, the net before tax was $4,500. The $450 tax is 10% of the $4,500 taxable base. The total due is $5,400.

gold_claims.claim_text: Widget revenue was $3,000 (200 units at $15)
The subtotal was $5,000
After a $500 discount, the net before tax was $4,500
The $450 tax is 10% of the $4,500 taxable base
gold_claims.trap: inferred operand (4500 is not stated in source; it is 5000-500)
gold_claims.notes: 450/4500 = 10%; the taxable base must be inferred

gold_claims.claim_text: The total due is $5,400
gold_claims.trap: direct misstatement; source total is 4950, summary says 5400

documents.name: Globex Corp — FY2024 annual highlights
documents.source:
Globex Corp — FY2024 Annual Highlights

Revenue: $1.2 billion (up from $1.0 billion in FY2023)
R&D spending: $180 million
Headcount: 4,500 employees
Net income: $240 million
Largest segment (Cloud): $600 million in revenue
documents.summary: Globex grew revenue to $1,200 million in FY2024, a 20% increase over the prior year. Net income of $240 million implied a net margin of 20%. R&D was $180 million, or 15% of revenue. International revenue grew 12% year over year. The Cloud segment, at $600 million, made up 50% of total revenue.

gold_claims.claim_text: Globex grew revenue to $1,200 million in FY2024, a 20% increase over the prior year
Net income of $240 million implied a net margin of 20%
R&D was $180 million, or 15% of revenue
International revenue grew 12% year over year
gold_claims.trap: missing operands (international revenue is absent from source) — must mark missing, not guess
gold_claims.notes: discipline test: no international figures in source

gold_claims.claim_text: The Cloud segment, at $600 million, made up 50% of total revenue

documents.name: Meridian Inc — Cost report
documents.source:
Meridian Inc — Cost Report

Marketing spend fell to $30 million this year from $40 million last year. Sales: $12 million. Support: $8 million. Engineering: $25 million.
documents.summary: Marketing spend dropped 25% to $30 million. Combined Sales and Support costs were $20 million. Total operating costs across the three functions were $50 million.

gold_claims.claim_text: Marketing spend dropped 25% to $30 million
gold_claims.trap: sign (decrease -> -25) AND operand_order (source lists new $30M before old $40M)

gold_claims.claim_text: Combined Sales and Support costs were $20 million
Total operating costs across the three functions were $50 million
